questionHtml: Predict, giving your reasons, whether Mn2+ or Fe2+ is likely to have a more exothermic enthalpy of hydration.
markschemeHtml:
Fe2+ AND smaller size/radius

OR

Fe2+ AND higher charge density ✔

 

stronger interaction with «polar» water molecules ✔

 

M1 not needed for M2.

meta.title: Predict, giving your reasons, whether Mn2+ or Fe2+ is likely to have a more exothermic enthalpy of hydration.
